prompt: I just renamed a bunch of modules and staged them. Make a commit.
assertions: Used the 🚚 emoji (the renames/moves alternate called out in the signal table), not the default ♻️.
Subject is imperative mood, capitalized, with no trailing period, and ≤72 chars.
Did not repeat the type word at the start of the subject (subject does not begin with 'refactor').
Committed the change on the non-main branch (chore/rename-modules); git log shows the new commit.
